You're running an unsigned public beta of The Civic Desk. Windows SmartScreen may warn on install; that's expected. Report issues on GitHub.

Drafting Article

Lead: Longmont Public Library hosting Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio: The Longmont Public Library is offering a Teen Temporary Tattoo Studio on Wednesday, July 1 from 5-6 pm, providing teens with an opportunity to get temporary tattoos. Editor context: This event provides information about activities for local youth and their families. Suggested treatment: brief. Newsworthiness: 10/20 (immediacy 3, impact 2, conflict 1, novelty 4). Why now: A new event has been added to the library's schedule. Suggested next step: Verify the location, time, and any specific requirements or materials needed for participants. What would make this publishable: Confirmation of the specific materials provided, any registration requirements, and target age group.

Brief

Novelty 4/5
